headline: Level up in faith and grow closer to God through prayer and games.

whatIsTheAppAbout: DoIt4Jesus is more than a prayer app, it's a movement to raise holy warriors who are faithful, respectful, and obedient to God's call. Through community prayer of the Holy Rosary, users combat evil, grow in virtue, and strengthen their relationship with God and the Blessed Virgin Mary through games and challenges.
whatIsTheAppAboutDescription: Inspired by sacred tradition and the mission to form strong Catholic men, DoIt4Jesus empowers you to live your faith boldly, stand firm against lies, and love yourself as God commands.
aboutRosaryDescription: The Rosary isn’t just beads and prayers—it’s a spiritual weapon. When we pray it together, we’re teaming up to push back the darkness and help save souls. Back in 1208, the Virgin Mary appeared to St. Dominic and gave him the ultimate spiritual weapon—the Rosary. She told him to share it with the world and use it to fight off the enemies of the Faith.
useTheAppToDescription1: Turn your daily prayer into a spiritual battle plan. With real-time group prayer, every Hail Mary becomes a strike against darkness.
useTheAppToDescription2: Connect instantly with others around the world to compete or pray ate the same time. Whether it’s 3 a.m. or noon, your Rosary is backed by every catholic.
useTheAppToDescription3: Track your spiritual growth, unlock milestones, and stay motivated with a gamified Rosary experience that rewards consistency, courage, and community.
whyPrayRosaryDescription1: Join our community as we embark on a transformative journey, praying the Rosary together for spiritual fortitude.
whyPrayRosaryDescription2: By praying the Rosary, we intercede for the salvation of souls, asking for God's mercy and grace to be bestowed upon those in need.
whyPrayRosaryDescription3: By praying the Rosary with others, you don't just seek strength — you become a warrior of light. Each Hail Mary is a blow against the darkness.
footerCTA: Battle Evil, One Bead at a Time!
rosaryWeaponDescription:
According to Fr. Don Calloway (a catholic priest), the Rosary isn’t just beads—it’s a spiritual lightsaber. In a world full of chaos, lies, and TikTok drama, this ancient prayer is your weapon to fight back.
 Let’s be real: we’re not just facing temptations—we’re in a spiritual war. And God’s not looking for spectators. He’s raising up warriors. The Rosary trains your soul like spiritual push-ups—building courage, faith, and the guts to stand up for truth, even when it’s hard. 
 Pray it daily. Swing it like a sword. And get ready to level up—in holiness, not just in your prayer app.
errorUpdatingPassword: Error updating password. Please try again.
whatIsTheRosaryDescription: At its heart, the Rosary is a prayer deeply rooted in Scripture, guiding us through the life of Christ with the rhythm of Hail Mary's. The term 'rosary' derives from the Latin for 'garland of roses,' with each rose representing a prayer and a tribute to the Virgin Mary.
whyPrayTheRosaryDescription: Discover the secret power that millions of people are using to transform their lives. 🙏✨ Tune in to Father Don Calloway’s eloquent discourse on the Rosary and its profound significance.
welcomeDescription: Hi {{firstName}} {{lastName}}, DoIt4Jesus is your spiritual companion designed to help you grow closer to Jesus through daily prayer and devotion to the Rosary. ✨
whatAreTheBenefits: The Promise to Those Who Pray
whatAreTheBenefitsDescription: Mary promises special graces, protection, conversion of sinners, peace, perseverance, and salvation for those who pray the Rosary with devotion.
whatAreTheBenefitsOfRosary:
1. Special protection and graces will be given to all who pray the Rosary.  
2. A powerful armor against hell – it will destroy vice, decrease sin, and defeat heresies.  
3. It will cause virtue and good works to flourish and obtain God’s mercy.  
4. The soul that recommends itself to Mary through the Rosary will not perish eternally.  
5. Those who recite the Rosary devoutly will not be overcome by misfortune; sinners will be converted, and the just will persevere in grace.  
6. Those truly devoted to the Rosary will not die without the Sacraments.  
7. The faithful children of the Rosary will have the light of God and graces to achieve salvation.  
8. The devoted will be delivered from purgatory.  
9. The faithful will merit a high degree of glory in Heaven.  
10. You will obtain all you ask through the Rosary, if it is according to God’s will.  
11. Those who spread devotion to the Rosary will be aided by Mary in all their needs.  
12. All who recite the Rosary are Mary’s beloved children and brothers/sisters of her Son Jesus.  
13. Devotion to the Rosary is a great sign of predestination (meaning a soul is on the path to Heaven).  
14. She will obtain for souls who faithfully recite the Rosary all necessary graces in life and at death.  
15. Peace in their families and societies that embrace the Rosary.

aboutDescription: DoIt4Jesus is a faith-based platform created to bring together people who want to grow spiritually through prayer, specifically by praying the Holy Rosary as a community.
ourStoryDescription: Born from a desire to build a digital space where faith and community intersect, DoIt4Jesus was created to make the Rosary accessible, engaging, and communal. What started as a simple idea has grown into a hub where believers around the world pray together in real time.
howItWorksDescription: Sign in, choose your mystery, and pray the Holy Rosary alongside others in real time. Track your progress, earn achievements, and grow in your devotion with every prayer session.
whoItsForDescription: DoIt4Jesus is for anyone seeking a deeper connection with God through the Rosary — from lifelong Catholics to those just discovering the beauty of this prayer.
joinUsDescription: Ready to strengthen your faith and join a global prayer movement?
buildPrayerCircle: Build your prayer circle, encourage one another, and deepen your bond in Christ.
scrupulosityWarning: A warning should be given to souls who are inclined to scrupulosity — those who are anxious or overly worried about whether they have committed a sin. In cases of doubt, it is always best to follow the advice of a trusted confessor rather than relying on one's own judgment.
mortalSinConditions: Note that mortal sin is not committed unless three conditions are present: (1) The act or thought must involve a serious matter. (2) The person must have full knowledge that what they are doing (or thinking) is seriously sinful at the time they do it. (3) The person must give full consent of the will — meaning they freely and deliberately choose to do it. If any of these conditions is absent, the sin may be venial rather than mortal.
forKidsDescription: This can assist children in developing a better understanding of themselves and their relationship with God, while also building empathy towards others.
forTeensDescription: This examination enables teens to recognize and manage their emotions, understand their spiritual needs, and develop a strong sense of ethics and morals.
forAdultsDescription: This exam encourages adults to question and analyze their daily actions and decisions from a spiritual perspective, to identify areas where they may have strayed from God's guidance.
marriedDescription: For those in the sacrament of marriage.
singleDescription: For those in the single life.
saintsIntercession: Ask for their intercession and God's grace.
